summary: Classified the ten open PRs in this mixed PR-inventory shard independently. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, fix PR, merge, and post-merge closeout are disabled for this job. #92394 is routed to central security handling; #91245 and #92342 need narrow maintainer decisions; the other open PRs should stay open as related backlog/candidate work.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with unresolved review/proof gates; keep open for maintainer or later repair path.
Focused open PR should stay open for normal maintainer review.
Route exact security-sensitive PR to central OpenClaw security handling; do not comment, close, merge, or fix through Clownfish.
Focused useful PR should stay open for maintainer review.
Plausible focused fix for an open issue; keep open.
Best open heartbeat candidate in its local family, but this inventory shard should only keep it open.
Useful related gateway availability/message-delivery PR; keep open for maintainer review.
Broad draft product/packaging direction and failed proof require maintainer decision, not autonomous cleanup.
Focused replacement PR should stay open; this job cannot merge it.
Dependency graph changes and active author follow-up need maintainer/admin decision before any finalization.

needs_human: #92342: broad draft external-plugin/Codex reliability build with failed real behavior proof needs maintainer product and technical direction.
#91245: dependency-guard failure plus dependency graph changes and active author follow-up need maintainer/admin decision.
